creator: astralblue@usa.net
text:
Due to a bug in amd compile configuration headers, amd cannot
	mount a UFS filesystem automatically.  (Amd does not set a
	a certain structure member necessary for UFS mount() calls.)

Fix: 

Apply the following patch.

	begin 644 40.amd-ufs
	M9&EF9B`M8W(@<W)C+V-O;G1R:6(O86UD+F]L9"]I;F-L=61E+V%M7V1E9G,N
	M:"!S<F,O8V]N=')I8B]A;60O:6YC;'5D92]A;5]D969S+F@**BHJ('-R8R]C
	M;VYT<FEB+V%M9"YO;&0O:6YC;'5D92]A;5]D969S+F@)4V%T($YO=B`Q-"`P
	M.3HR,3HT."`Q.3DX"BTM+2!S<F,O8V]N=')I8B]A;60O:6YC;'5D92]A;5]D
	M969S+F@)36]N($IA;B`Q,2`P,#HT,#HQ,R`Q.3DY"BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ
	M*@HJ*BH@,3`U,"PQ,#4U("HJ*BH*+2TM(#$P-3`L,3`V,B`M+2TM"B`@(V5N
	M9&EF("\J($A!5D5?54937U5&4U]-3U5.5%](("HO"B`@"B`@+RH**R`@*B!!
	M8W1I;VYS('1O('1A:V4@:68@/'5F<R]U9G,O=69S;6]U;G0N:#X@97AI<W1S
	M+@HK("`J+PHK("-I9F1E9B!(059%7U5&4U]51E-?549334]53E1?2`HK(",@
	M:6YC;'5D92`\=69S+W5F<R]U9G-M;W5N="YH/@HK("-E;F1I9B`O*B!(059%
	M7U5&4U]51E-?549334]53E1?2"`J+PHK(`HK("\J"B`@("H@07)E(%-?25-$
	M25(L(%-?25-214<L(&5T(&%L(&)R;VME;C\@($EF(&YO="P@:6YC;'5D92`\
	M<WES+W-T870N:#XN"B`@("H@5'5R;F5D(&]F9B!T:&4@;F]T('5S:6YG('-Y
	M<R]S=&%T+F@@8F%S960@;VX@:68@=&AE(&UA8W)O<R!A<F4*("`@*B`B8G)O
	M:V5N(BP@8F5C875S92!T:&5Y(&EN8V]R<F5C=&QY(&=E="!R97!O<G1E9"!A
	M<R!B<F]K96X@;VX*9&EF9B`M8W(@<W)C+W5S<BYS8FEN+V%M9"YO;&0O:6YC
	M;'5D92]C;VYF:6<N:"!S<F,O=7-R+G-B:6XO86UD+VEN8VQU9&4O8V]N9FEG
	M+F@**BHJ('-R8R]U<W(N<V)I;B]A;60N;VQD+VEN8VQU9&4O8V]N9FEG+F@)
	M36]N($IA;B`Q,2`P,#HR-#HQ-"`Q.3DY"BTM+2!S<F,O=7-R+G-B:6XO86UD
	M+VEN8VQU9&4O8V]N9FEG+F@)36]N($IA;B`Q,2`P,#HT,#HQ,R`Q.3DY"BHJ

	M7T9)14Q$7U5&4U]!4D=37U1?1E-014,@*B\*("`*("`O*B!D;V5S(&5F<U]A

	M245,1%]%1E-?05)'4U]47T9,04=3("HO"BTM+2`W-3,L-S4Y("TM+2T*("`O
	M*B`C=6YD968@2$%615]&245,1%]51E-?05)'4U]47T9,04=3("HO"B`@"B`@
	M+RH@9&]E<R!U9G-?87)G<U]T(&AA=F4@9G-P96,@9FEE;&0_("HO"B$@(V1E

	M2$%615]&245,1%]%1E-?05)'4U]47T9,04=3("HO"BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ
	M*@HJ*BH@,3`S."PQ,#0T("HJ*BH*("`O*B`C=6YD968@=&UP9G-?87)G<U]T
	M("HO"B`@"B`@+RH@1&5F:6YE(&$@='EP92!F;W(@=&AE('5F<U]A<F=S('-T
	M<G5C='5R92`J+PHA("\J("-U;F1E9B!U9G-?87)G<U]T("HO"B`@"B`@+RH@
	M1&5F:6YE(&$@='EP92!F;W(@=&AE(&5F<U]A<F=S('-T<G5C='5R92`J+PH@
	M("\J("-U;F1E9B!E9G-?87)G<U]T("HO"BTM+2`Q,#,X+#$P-#0@+2TM+0H@
	M("\J("-U;F1E9B!T;7!F<U]A<F=S7W0@*B\*("`*("`O*B!$969I;F4@82!T
	M>7!E(&9O<B!T:&4@=69S7V%R9W,@<W1R=6-T=7)E("HO"B$@(V1E9FEN92!U
	M9G-?87)G<U]T('-T<G5C="!U9G-?87)G<PH@(`H@("\J($1E9FEN92!A('1Y
	M<&4@9F]R('1H92!E9G-?87)G<R!S=')U8W1U<F4@*B\*("`O*B`C=6YD968@
	M969S7V%R9W-?="`J+PHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BHJ*BH**BHJ(#$X,S`L,3@S-2`J
	M*BHJ"BTM+2`Q.#,P+#$X,S@@+2TM+0H@(`H@("\J($1E9FEN92!I9B!Y;W4@
	M:&%V92!T:&4@/'5F<R]U9G-?;6]U;G0N:#X@:&5A9&5R(&9I;&4N("`J+PH@
	M("\J("-U;F1E9B!(059%7U5&4U]51E-?34]53E1?2"`J+PHK(`HK("\J($1E
	M9FEN92!I9B!Y;W4@:&%V92!T:&4@/'5F<R]U9G,O=69S;6]U;G0N:#X@:&5A
	M9&5R(&9I;&4N("`J+PHK("-D969I;F4@2$%615]51E-?54937U5&4TU/54Y4
	M7T@*("`*("`O*B!$969I;F4@:68@>6]U(&AA=F4@=&AE(#QU;FES=&0N:#X@
	K:&5A9&5R(&9I;&4N("`J+PH@("-D969I;F4@2$%615]53DE35$1?2"`Q"CX@
	`
	end

-- 
Eugene M. Kim <astralblue@usa.net>

"Is your music unpopular?  Make it popular; make music
which people like, or make people who like your music."
How-To-Repeat: 
	Make a map with an entry with type:=ufs, like:

	home	type:=ufs;dev:=/dev/wd1s1e

	and try to chdir to the automounted directory, like /ufs/home
	where /ufs is the automount directory for the map above.
	It will fail with amd logging a system call error in mount().
